pkgmetadata.longdescription: Delphi Epidata API ClientThis package provides a programmatic interface to[Delphi](httpsdelphi.cmu.edu)s epidemiological data (epidata)API. Source code and usage information can be found at[httpsgithub.comcmu-delphidelphi-epidata](httpsgithub.comcmu-delphidelphi-epidata).
